creator: rannumgen@globaleyes.net
text:
After install, NFE driver for nVidia nForce MCP55 Networking Adapter
using Marvell 88E1149 Gigabit ethernet chip appears to fail to completely
set up ethernet interface. IFCONFIG shows UP with proper IP, NETMASK,
BROADCAST, MEDIA values with active STATUS. Yet, no external network
connection works. Installing Red Hat Enterprise on same machine IS able
to make external network conections.

NFE driver chosen by system - not Admin.
